data.reasoning: Both models failed to audit the critical PKGBUILD file due to erroneous binary detection, leaving zero files reviewed. Without examining build/install instructions, safety cannot be determined.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD skipped entirely despite being mandatory for security assessment
No other files (like .install hooks) were reviewed due to premature termination
false_negatives: All risks in PKGBUILD were missed: potential malicious commands, unsafe downloads, or privilege escalation during build/install
learnings: Critical failure: Models must handle PKGBUILD as text even with non-ASCII characters
Tool should implement fallback decoding for suspected-binary build scripts
Add validation for PKGBUILD readability before audit initiation
Prioritize PKGBUILD review over all other files in AUR context
